mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub (id, user_id, message, type, source_title, source_category, jump_url, `read`, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{message}, #{type}, #{sourceTitle}, #{sourceCategory}, #{jumpUrl}, #{read, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sub WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY `read` ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sub SET `read` = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `read` = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sub WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `read` = 1
